promt_generator.promt:
You are a professional novel translation expert.
Below you will find the context of a web novel/novel project:
- Existing successful translation prompts (if any)
- Story wiki/character information (if any)
- Sample chapters from the story (in the original language)
By analyzing this data, I want you to create the BEST translation prompts for this story.
You must generate 3 different prompts:
### PROMPT A - LITERAL (Word-for-Word Translation)
A prompt that translates while preserving the structure and word choice of the original text as much as possible.
### PROMPT B - NATURAL (Natural Translation)
A prompt that reads naturally and fluently in the target language, prioritizing the reader experience.
### PROMPT C - BALANCED (Balanced Translation)
A prompt that balances literal and natural, respecting both fidelity and fluency.
Each prompt:
- Target language: English
- Source language: Auto-detect (usually Korean, Chinese, or Japan)
- Must be appropriate for the genre, tone, and terminology of the story
Provide your response EXACTLY in this format (use === separator between each prompt):
===PROMPT_A===
[Prompt A content here]
===PROMPT_B===
[Prompt B content here]
===PROMPT_C===
[Prompt C content here]
===END===
Here is the project context:
{context}

ml_terminology_extractor.promt_part1:
Below is the context of an untranslated web novel/story.
Please analyze this text and identify the MOST IMPORTANT proper nouns, place names, titles, and names of special abilities/techniques that appear in the text.
Determine the Turkish translations for these terms that best fit the context of the story.
 PLEASE DO THE FOLLOWING:
1. Include only clear proper nouns and terms (names, places, technical terms, etc.) that form the cornerstones of the story.
2. DO NOT include simple words in the list.
3. List the terms ONLY in the format ‘Source_Language_Term → English_Translation’. Do not provide any other explanations or use bullet points.
SOURCE TEXT:

main_window.about_text:
Novel Translation Tool.

This application was developed by UtkuCanC to translate web novels using artificial intelligence support.

Version: 1.9.9 (App-wide logging system added. Token count freeze and data loss errors fixed.)

Version: 2.0.0 (MCP-API Support, JS Selenium Downloader, Cache Support, Terminology Support, and more)

Version: 2.1.0 (SRP restructuring, Batch System (Under development), Async System, Project-based SQLite, System improvements)

Version: 2.2.0 (Batch Translation Mode and Async Translation can now be used together for faster translation. API Pool and MCP Endpoint rotation added. Some bugs fixed.)

Version: 2.3.0 (New interface and improvements for a more stable and faster experience. Theme editor panel added.)

Version: 2.4.0 (Multi-language and Localization Support)

Developer: UtkuCanC
March 2026

app_settings.title: Application Settings
app_settings.ml_max_tokens_note:
This value determines the maximum source text size
to send during AI Terminology Generation.
app_settings.prompt_gen_max_tokens_note:
This value determines the maximum token limit
used by the Prompt Generator during chapter sampling.
app_settings.js_sources_note: You can add your custom JavaScript-based site sources to the download method list.
